items.title: 'Spider-Man of Yemen' dies falling into volcanic crater
items.summary: Al-Qaqa Ibn Antar had been attempting to climb its walls without safety equipment when he fell in, local authorities say.

items.title: African Continent Gains 10 Years of Life Expectancy Since 2000 Despite Wars, Famine, and Instability
items.summary: You can measure human progress by GDP, by employment rates, home-ownership, or average national income, but when you’re lying in your bed and it’s time to pay the piper, it’s difficult not to see the…
